headline: Record-Setting Momentum Rally Is Drawing Doubters
summary: (Bloomberg) -- April’s rally in risk assets has weathered stalled peace talks, signs of resurgent inflation and a central-bank succession drama. Investors may be about to find out if the speed of the advance itself poses a threat to a further ascent.Most Read from BloombergThe Billion-Barrel Hormuz Oil Shock Is About to Crash DemandGunman Detained, Trump Evacuated After Shooting at Press DinnerSergey Brin Confronted Gavin Newsom at a Treehouse Party — Then Launched a Political WarTrump Scraps US

headline: Bank Of America Backs US$16b AI Data Center And Fee Potential
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) is helping lead a US$16b financing package for a new data center campus in Michigan. The project is designed to support AI infrastructure needs for Oracle and OpenAI. The financing positions Bank of America as a key structuring agent and financial advisor on one of the largest purpose built data center projects in the US. For Bank of America, this deal sits at the intersection of traditional corporate banking and the build out of AI focused digital infrastructure...

headline: Bank of America Lifts ED Target Ahead of Q1, Maintains Bearish View
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) is included among the 10 Best May Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 24, Bank of America raised its price recommendation on Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) to $107 from $104. It reiterated an Underperform rating. Ahead of Q1 results, the firm projected adjusted EPS of $2.28, in line with consensus. It […]

headline: BofA just flagged the best portfolio strategy since the Great Depression
summary: Most people think they have a balanced portfolio. They don't. They have whatever their 401(k) menu offered 15 years ago, plus a target-date fund, plus the slow accumulation of mistakes that come from never rebalancing. For two generations, the default answer to "how should I invest?" has been some ...
